items.title: Deploying enterprise stablecoin rails on Solana in days with Crossmint
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of enterprise stablecoin infrastructure on Solana enhances its appeal for businesses, potentially increasing transaction volume and liquidity.

items.title: Solana Changelog: July 23, 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: Updates in the Solana Changelog indicate ongoing improvements, which can boost network efficiency and attract more developers and users to the ecosystem.

items.title: LayerZero, Keeta enable tokenized bank deposits across Ethereum, Solana and Base
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tokenized bank deposits across multiple chains, including Solana, could drive cross-chain liquidity and broaden the use cases for SOL in financial applications.
